case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. OSCAR LIZARDO LEON BRAVO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO, OSCAR LIZARDO LEON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-13-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT OSCAR LIZARDO LEON BRAVO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-11-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO, OSCAR LIZARDO LEON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO COLLECTIONS AGENT. DEFENDANT OSCAR LIZARDO LEON BRAVO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAVO, OSCAR LIZARDO LEON $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
